metadata.description: Single-layer N5 core map with contextual grouping.

note_fields.Example:
## Core use
- wa marks Topic marker.
- Compare it with nearby particles in the world

$Example:$ watashi wa gakusei desu.
note_fields.Tip: Compare with nearby particles in the graph to understand the difference.
note_fields.DiagramCaption: Particle position in the sentence and what it highlights.

note_fields.When:
## When to use
- Use **konnichiwa** in common daily context
- Keep the tone natural and lightweight
- Learn it together with nearby expressions
note_fields.Example:
## Example
- konnichiwa : Daytime greeting.
- Try opening connected nodes to compare nuance
note_fields.VisualCaption: Daily expression floating inside its common context.
